# terminal_email (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "terminal_email" "example_email" {
  email = "john@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address to subscribe to Terminal updates with.

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) available values: "ok"
